rationale: Both reviews surface (and would remove) the identical core api-design flaws grounded in the diff: vacuous IsUnipotent (under geomReduced+reduced A), partial AlgPoints, and the True placeholder fields/lemma that make the classes empty (lines 68-76). Review 1's extra nits (variable rebinding, redundant instance, snake_case naming, missing @[simp] and char lemmas) are either stylistic or demand scope beyond the explicit stubs, so acting on either set of changes produces an equivalent resulting PR.
